summary: Hand-extended cmd/openrouter-pp-mcp/main.go to add `--http :addr` flag for Streamable HTTP transport (NewStreamableHTTPServer).
reason: Spec sets `mcp.transport: [stdio, http]` per the printing-press SKILL's Phase 2 MCP enrichment guidance, but printing-press v4.2.0 silently ignores that field and emits stdio-only main.go. HTTP transport is required for in-container agents (e.g., JARVIS at host.docker.internal:8092) to reach the host MCP. Tracked upstream as cli-printing-press#825.
validated_outcome: MCP `initialize` + `tools/list` handshake verified end-to-end from inside a host container at http://host.docker.internal:8092/mcp.
